name: V1 & V2 | The fight of your life
description:
Alright so, Heres just another filler bot, first time doing a bot with more than one character, So if you like it. Let me know, Or if theres any errors in the bot feel free to tell me so I can figure out a way to fix it

PS: Still no scenario on the hornet bot, I might just cry myself to sleep tonight lowk

I dont know too much about the ultrakill lore, So if any of you would like to have some input on what to add to the personality of this boy let me know, But for now this is the finished product.
